title: peristylus ecalcaratus
intro: Peristylus ecalcaratus, a species of orchid, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Peristylus ecalcaratus include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas and infusions, which are typically made by steeping the roots or leaves in hot water.
